name: Lemon Chiffon Pie
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 8
1. Soak gelatin in water.
2. In a double boiler over gently simmering water, beat the egg yolks.
3. Add 1/2 cup sugar and lemon juice to the beaten yolks. Cook, stirring until the mixture coats the bottom of a spoon.
4. Add grated lemon peel, gelatin, and food coloring to the mixture. Stir well.
5. Cool in the refrigerator for about half an hour until slightly thickened.
6. Beat egg whites with 1/2 cup sugar separately.
7. Fold the beaten egg white mixture into the lemon mixture.
8. Fold in the whipped topping.
9. Spoon the batter into the baked pie crust.
10. Refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours before serving.
11. Garnish with chocolate shavings and lemon slices.
